meaning: n.伊斯兰教朝圣服,穿朝圣服时的神圣状态
examples: Being in Ihram means not whinging about people, not intentionally harming anyone and if you're married, no sexual relations with your spouse.
And so into their ihram they got, and headed for the mosque for some last minute supplication and quiet before heading off.
To do that we'll have to enter a state of Ihram - which has strict codes on what to do, how to dress and how to behave.
